title: repopact doctor: diagnose and repair adoption drift

acceptance_criteria.text: `repopact doctor` diagnoses adoption drift (missing root contract, stale registry scopes, unregistered nested contracts, incomplete _audit triplets, schema skew, gitignored records); read-only by default, exits non-zero on errors.
`--fix` applies safe, non-destructive repairs (never overwriting a differing/extended schema) and the repaired repo validates; regression-tested.
Proven on real repos: a drifted synthetic repo is repaired to valid; ForgeLink reports healthy with its intentional preflight schema extension flagged for review, not clobbered.
